title: PolicyDecision
description: The authorization verdict produced by agent-kernel's policy engine for a capability invocation request.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this policy decision. Used to correlate with TraceEvents.

capability_id.description: The capability ID that was evaluated.

principal.description: The principal whose authorization was evaluated.

token_id.description: The CapabilityToken ID used in this evaluation, if any.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the decision. Recommended for deny decisions.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this decision was made.
